text:
Secretary, European Union and International Economic Affairs, CO), Nicholas Alton
(former Minister Counsellor, British Embassy Washington, FCDO) and others

Subject: RE: Joint statement

From: Nicholas Alton Personal >
Date: 27/02/2025, 12:06
To: Peter Mandelson Personal >, Michael Ellam
< Personal
CC: Mungo Woodifield Personal >, Jonathan Powell
Personal , Varun Chandra Personal >, James Roscoe
Personal , Lucy Ferguson Personal , Matthew
Doyle Personal >, Sophie Nazemi Personal P JCS
Personal , "Ailsa Terry (No.10)" Personal >, Jcs
Personal . Jcs Personal , JCS
Jcs Personal , JCS Personal ,
Jcs Personal
OFFICIAL

For speed, | have tracked our proposed changes (including the points below) in the attached
document. | suggest we get this back into the US system as quickly as possible this morning.
So if we can get together at 0930 to review, | propose sending a version of the attached back
to the US side as soon as possible after that.

Nick

Nicholas Alton | Minister Counsellor (Political) | British Embassy Washington

3100 Massachusetts Avenue NW | Washington DC 20008

Cell: Personal | Phone: Personal | Personal
EA: JCS | Personal |Cell; Personal

    I have emailed with my views. Please work with Jonathan and Mike.
    Get Outlook for iOS
    OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
    From: Mungo Woodifield 
>
    Sent: Wednesday, February 26, 2025 11:07:36 PM
    To: Michael Ellam 
>; Jonathan Powell 
>; Ailsa Terry (No.10) 
>; Varun Chandra 
; Peter Mandelson 
>; James Roscoe 
>; Lucy Ferguson <
; Nicholas Alton 
    Cc: 
    Subject: Joint statement
    OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
    Hi all
    Do you want to meet tomorrow morning to discuss US edits to joint statement? There should 
be some
 time before 0900 briefings with PM - if people can get to embassy by 0830? 
    We are sending the US edits overnight to London colleagues with our initial embassy view 
(you will all be in copy). 
 Best, 
Personal

Ambassador,
You’d wish to have sight of the attached which arrived overnight from SofS Defence in 
response to your letter about Defence/Technology opportunities. We will have a printed 
copy in your box.
 | Military Assistant and Deputy Chief of 
Staff to His Majesty’s Ambassador | British Embassy Washington
3100 Massachusetts Ave NW, Washington, DC 20008
